title: Verify Sort Confirmation Message And Tote Location Update After Parcel Sort
summary: Confirm that after a parcel sorts to a chute and into a tote, the critical divert confirm or sort confirmation message is present and the parcel is added to the tote location in the rack.
when_to_use: Use when verifying whether a parcel sort event was properly tracked after the parcel sorted to a chute location and into a tote, specifically to confirm the critical divert confirm or sort confirmation message was received and that the software associated the parcel to the tote location in the rack.

responsibilities: Check for the divert confirm or sort confirmation message
Verify the parcel was added to the tote location in the rack
Record whether parcel destination and tote contents can be accounted for

safety_notes: This is a source-described verification task and is support-safe based on the candidate.

Do not infer parcel destination or tote contents if the divert confirm or sort confirmation message is missing, because the source states the system may not know where the parcel went or what is in the tote.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the chat or message view that shows divert confirm or sort confirmation messages
Access to the software view showing tote location in the rack

access_required: Access to the chat or message view that shows divert confirm or sort confirmation messages
Access to the software view showing tote location in the rack
system_preconditions: A parcel event exists where the parcel sorted down to a chute location and into a tote

visual_references.description: Training slide describing parcel sort into a chute and tote, the critical divert confirm or sort confirmation message, and software adding the parcel to the tote location in the rack.

steps.title: Identify the parcel sort event
steps.purpose: Establish the specific parcel event to verify in the message and tote tracking views.
steps.instruction: Identify the parcel event where the parcel sorted down to a chute location and into a tote.
steps.expected_result: A specific parcel sort event is selected for verification.
steps.healthy_condition: The parcel event corresponds to a sort to a chute location and into a tote.
steps.failure_condition: The parcel event cannot be identified or cannot be tied to a chute-and-tote sort.

actions.label: Identify parcel event
actions.exact_action: Identify the parcel event where the parcel sorted down to a chute location and into a tote.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the lifecycle description stating that a parcel sorts down to a chute location and into a tote.

stop_or_escalate_if: The parcel event cannot be identified as a chute-to-tote sort event.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: A parcel will sort down to a chute location and into a tote; software adds that parcel to the tote located in that rack.

steps.title: Check for the sort confirmation message
steps.purpose: Verify that the next critical tracking message was generated after the parcel sort event.
steps.instruction: Check for the next chat message described in the source as a divert confirm or sort confirmation.
steps.expected_result: A divert confirm or sort confirmation message is visible for the parcel sort event.
steps.healthy_condition: The next chat message after the sort event is the divert confirm or sort confirmation message.
steps.failure_condition: No divert confirm or sort confirmation message is present for the parcel sort event.

actions.label: Review chat message view
actions.exact_action: Check for the next chat message described in the source as a divert confirm or sort confirmation.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the slide content describing the next chat message as a divert confirm or sort confirmation.

stop_or_escalate_if: The divert confirm or sort confirmation message is not present.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: This triggers the next message from the chat... a divert confirm or sort confirmation.

steps.title: Confirm the message was received
steps.purpose: Validate the critical tracking condition identified by the source.
steps.instruction: Verify that the confirmation message was received, because the source states this message is critical to knowing where the parcel went and what is in the tote.
steps.expected_result: The confirmation message is confirmed as received for the parcel sort event.
steps.healthy_condition: The message is present and can be used to account for where the parcel went and what is in the tote.
steps.failure_condition: The message is missing, so the system may not know where the parcel went or what is in the tote.

actions.label: Confirm message receipt
actions.exact_action: Verify that the confirmation message was received, because the source states this message is critical to knowing where the parcel went and what is in the tote.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the statement that the divert confirm or sort confirmation message is critical because without it the system does not know where the parcel went or what is in the tote.

stop_or_escalate_if: The confirmation message was not received.
The parcel destination or tote contents cannot be determined because the message is missing.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: This message is pretty critical because if we don't get it, we don't actually know where it went or what's in the tote.

steps.title: Verify parcel was added to the tote location
steps.purpose: Confirm that software updated tote-location tracking after the sort confirmation.
steps.instruction: Check that the software added the parcel to the tote location in the rack after the sort confirmation.
steps.expected_result: The parcel appears associated with the tote location in the rack.
steps.healthy_condition: The software shows the parcel added to the tote located in the rack.
steps.failure_condition: The parcel does not appear to be added to the tote location in the rack after the sort event.

actions.label: Review tote location record
actions.exact_action: Check that the software added the parcel to the tote location in the rack after the sort confirmation.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the lifecycle description stating that software adds the parcel to the tote location in the rack.
Look for the container selection view indicators showing tote presence and tote number at a rack location.
Look for rack location details and tote lookup concepts that help inspect which tote is on a rack.

stop_or_escalate_if: The parcel does not appear to be added to the tote location in the rack after the sort event.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: A parcel will sort down to a chute location and into a tote; software adds that parcel to the tote located in that rack.

steps.title: Record the verification outcome
steps.purpose: Capture whether parcel destination and tote contents can be accounted for from the available tracking evidence.
steps.instruction: Record whether the parcel destination and tote contents can be accounted for from the confirmation message and tote location update.
steps.expected_result: A clear verification outcome is recorded as confirmed or not confirmed.
steps.healthy_condition: The outcome shows that both the confirmation message and tote location update support parcel tracking.
steps.failure_condition: The outcome shows that parcel destination or tote contents cannot be accounted for due to missing confirmation or missing tote update.

actions.label: Record verification result
actions.exact_action: Record whether the parcel destination and tote contents can be accounted for from the confirmation message and tote location update.

stop_or_escalate_if: The parcel is not added to the tote location in the rack.
The parcel destination and tote contents cannot be accounted for from the available evidence.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: This message is pretty critical because if we don't get it, we don't actually know where it went or what's in the tote.
A parcel will sort down to a chute location and into a tote; software adds that parcel to the tote located in that rack.

success_criteria: The divert confirm or sort confirmation message is present for the parcel sort event.
The parcel is shown as added to the tote location in the rack.
The parcel destination and tote contents can be accounted for from the confirmation message and tote location update.
healthy_conditions: A parcel sort event to a chute and tote can be identified.
The next chat message is a divert confirm or sort confirmation.
The software shows the parcel added to the tote location in the rack.
failure_conditions: The divert confirm or sort confirmation message is not present.
The confirmation message was not received or cannot be verified.
The system may not know where the parcel went or what is in the tote.
The parcel does not appear to be added to the tote location in the rack after the sort event.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the sort confirmation or divert confirm message is not present, because the source states the system may not know where the parcel went or what is in the tote.
Escalate if the parcel does not appear to be added to the tote location in the rack after the sort event.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Parcel lifecycle slide showing chute-to-tote sort, critical divert confirm or sort confirmation message, and parcel addition to tote location in rack.
Container selection view showing tote presence and tote number at a rack location.
Rack location and tote lookup concepts for checking which tote is on a rack.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: This triggers the next message from the chat... a divert confirm or sort confirmation. This message is pretty critical because if we don't get it, we don't actually know where it went or what's in the tote.
